config.mission_preparation.provider_plac: Leave empty to use main provider
help.mission_preparation.enabled: Enable LLM-based pre-analysis of missions before execution
help.mission_preparation.provider: Override the LLM provider for preparation analysis. Leave empty to use the main provider.
help.mission_preparation.timeout_seconds: Maximum time in seconds for a single preparation analysis
help.mission_preparation.max_essential_t: Maximum number of tools to include in the preparation analysis
help.mission_preparation.cache_expiry_ho: How long a preparation remains valid before it needs to be refreshed
help.mission_preparation.min_confidence: Minimum confidence score (0-1) required for a preparation to be used
help.mission_preparation.auto_prepare_sc: Automatically prepare scheduled missions when they are created or modified
